metadata.title: Unexpected Mid Rotation Turns Into a Fast Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a quick read on enemy movement leads to a clean 2-kill mid fight. Timing and positioning made all the difference here.
What’s your favorite way to catch opponents rotating?

Let me know your best mid fight moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Let me know your best mid fight moments in the comments!
